eng.definition: make (someone) feel annoyed, frustrated, or worried, especially with trivial matters
examples: The memory of the conversation still vexed him.
The causes of this problem continue to vex analysts.
He was vexed by the children's disobedience.

hin.definition: The creation of something in the mind or the act of creating something new
examples: यह आविष्कार मेरे लिए बहुत उपयोगी है.
विज्ञान के क्षेत्र में नए आविष्कार हमारे जीवन को बेहतर बना रहे हैं.
